title: Sistema TO GO Multi Split Meal & Food Prep Containers | 820ml | School Lunch Boxes with Dividers & Clips | BPA-Free | 5 Count
features: KEEPS MEALS FRESHER FOR LONGER: Airtight containers with Sistema easy-locking clips and flexible seals
MEAL PREP CONTAINERS WITH COMPARTMENTS: Convenient 5-pack is great for meal prepping for the week ahead, as well as taking to school, enjoying a packed lunch on days out, storing leftovers and more
PERFECT FOR: Meal prep and portion control, as well as storing different meal combos, fruit, pasta, snacks and more
DIMENSIONS: L 233 mm x H 43 mm x W 173 mm
CARE INSTRUCTIONS: Dishwasher (top rack), microwave (without lid), fridge and freezer-safe; designed and made in New Zealand; phthalate and BPA-free
description: From the manufacturer Multi Split 5 Pack • Sistema Multi Split food storage containers are ideal for meal prep and portion control. The rectangular divided containers are perfect for meal combos, fruit, pasta, snacks, and more. • Convenient 5 pack is ideal for meal prepping the whole work week. • Great for work, school, lunch, leftovers, and more. • Stackable containers have ridged lids, so they take up less space in the fridge, freezer, and pantry. • Reusable and durable eliminating the need for disposable single-use plastic or plastic wrap. Set includes: 5 x 820ml Multi Split containers with lids. Why You'll Love It Keep Food Fresh Multi-compartments keep your ingredients separated and fresh until you are ready to eat. Modular Stacking Stackable containers have ridged lids, so they take up less space in the fridge, freezer, and pantry. Microwave Safe, Dishwasher Safe & Freezer Safe For easy clean up, Sistema TO GO food storage containers and lids can go in the dishwasher (top rack). They can also be stored in the freezer and easily microwaved (without lid) to defrost and reheat. Made in New Zealand Made in New Zealand from Phthalate free and BPA free materials.* * Tested in a Swiss-based accredited laboratory. (Test Report # 2017L41815/1, issued in 2018).

specifications_table.Product care instructions: ‎Dishwasher wash on top shelf, refrigerator and freezer safe, wipe clean with damp or dry cloth. Not oven or microwave safe without lid.
specifications_table.Included components: ‎Includes: 5 x Multi Split containers with lids (820ml)
